aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Autumn Heating and Cooling due to low content depth and minimal authority signals, despite having foundational SEO elements in place.
quick_wins: Expand content to include detailed service explanations and unique value propositions.
Implement a FAQ schema to address common HVAC queries and improve AI visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized or visible, severely limiting local search presence.
critical_issues: GBP not found, making the business invisible in local AI-driven searches.
Lack of photos, posts, and Q&A to engage potential customers and improve local SEO.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Focus on expanding citations to industry-specific directories for added authority.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The website lacks depth in content and authority signals, making it less likely for AI to recommend it.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Kansas City, MO.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema and expanding service pages with conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and customer testimonials to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the go-to HVAC expert in Kansas City.

agency_pitch.proof_point: Your GBP is not found, and your website lacks the content depth and schema markup that AI models favor.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach will enhance your content, optimize your GBP, and implement strategic schema to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer you wait, the more ground you lose.
